Police Chase Drifter

Collect money and ride with speed while escaping the police cars. Police Chase Drifter will give you the chance to become a drifter champion driving through the obstacles of the city. You will only get rid of the police cars by making them destroy themselves in the tight corners. Follow the arrows that will show you the way to the money.

Play Police Chase Drifter Online

Loading game...
About Police Chase Drifter

Collect money and ride with speed while escaping the police cars. Police Chase Drifter will give you the chance to become a drifter champion driving through the obstacles of the city. You will only get rid of the police cars by making them destroy themselves in the tight corners. Follow the arrows that will show you the way to the money. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Police Chase Drifter in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Car game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Police Chase Drifter for free?

Yes. Police Chase Drifter is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Police Chase Drifter?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
